default.audience: people who like specific jokes instead of generic merch

geography.audience: map nerds, state-flag obsessives, and obscure place loyalists

transportation.audience: transit people who absolutely notice the reference

movies.audience: people who quote scenes faster than they explain themselves

sports.audience: fans who turn niche loyalty into a personality trait

music.audience: listeners who like their references a little deeper than radio level

funny.audience: people who prefer deadpan jokes over obvious punchlines

religion.audience: people who enjoy theological references with some bite
